name: Mexican Polvorones
recipeInstructions:
For the cookie: Combine shortening, sugar, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a large bowl. Beat until light and creamy. Add flour and baking powder. Beat at low speed until blended. Shape dough into 1.25-inch circles using a pancake turner or spatula. For the coating: Combine sugar, chocolate, and cinnamon in a shallow bowl. Set aside.
Bake cookies in a preheated 300-degree oven for 20 to 25 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for one minute. Place each cookie in the coating mixture. Coat both sides. Cool on wire racks. Yield: Approximately 2 dozen cookies.
